messages.body: Can we sort out the kids' schedule for this year? Work is going to have me traveling a lot.
The kids' routines are set - school, Emma has soccer Tuesdays, Noah has reading group Thursdays. Your weekends are every other Friday to Sunday.
Reminder you have Emma and Noah this weekend. Pickup is Friday at 5.
Something came up with work, can you keep them this weekend? I'll make it up to you.
Kept both kids all weekend. I took them to the science museum on Saturday.
Emma has a dentist appointment Thursday. I'll pick her up from school and take her.
Emma's filling is done. I paid the $140 copay at the office.
Noah's parent-teacher conference is Feb 9 at 4pm. Can you make it?
I'll be out of town for work. You'll have to go.
Went to Noah's conference. His teacher says he's a bit behind in reading and we should keep an eye on it.
Your weekend with the kids is the 16th to 18th. Still good?
Can we push it a week? I'll take them the following weekend instead.
This weekend isn't going to work either. I'll catch up with them next month.
It's been over a month since you've seen the kids or even asked about them. Emma keeps asking when she'll see you.
Been completely swamped at work. I'll take them next weekend, I promise.
Waited with the kids until 6. You never showed for pickup. Emma was in tears.
I mixed up the days, my fault. Sorry.
Registered Emma and Noah for summer camp at Oakwood. I paid the $600 deposit today.
Emma's soccer game is Saturday at 10 if you'd like to come watch her.
Took Emma to her game, she scored a goal. Noah and I were there cheering for her.
Noah spiked a fever tonight. I took him to urgent care - it's an ear infection, he's on antibiotics now.
I can take the kids this weekend.
You had the kids Saturday to Sunday afternoon. That was the first visit since January.
Emma's spring recital is June 3 at the school. I hope you can be there for her.
Emma's recital was wonderful, she had a solo. I recorded it for you since you couldn't come.
Summer camp starts June 17. I'll handle all the drop-offs and pickups.
Camp is going great, both kids are loving it.
I haven't heard from you in weeks. School starts Aug 12 and the kids need supplies and new clothes.
Can you take care of the school stuff? I'll send money when things settle down.
Bought all the school supplies, backpacks, and clothes for both kids. It came to about $320.
First day of school. I dropped Emma and Noah off this morning.
Emma made the school soccer team. Practice is Mondays and Wednesdays - I'll be driving her.
I'd like to see the kids. Is this Saturday okay?
You had the kids Saturday afternoon for a few hours and brought them home before dinner.
Emma has a dental cleaning Sep 27. I'll take her after school.
Noah's birthday is Oct 9. I'm planning a small party for him.
Noah's birthday party was today - 8 of his friends came. He kept asking if you would call.
Sorry I missed Noah's birthday. Tell him I said happy birthday.
I took the kids trick-or-treating in the neighborhood for Halloween.
The kids are off for winter break Dec 21 to Jan 5. Do you want any days with them?
I'll take them December 26 to 28.
Emma's winter concert was tonight. I went - she sang a solo and was so proud.
You picked the kids up this morning for the two days.
Kids are home. Noah said you were on your phone a lot but they had an okay time.
New year. Emma's soccer is starting again, and I've enrolled Noah in a math tutoring program.
I've been thinking about this. I want 50/50 custody of the kids this year.
We can talk about it, but you've seen Emma and Noah only a handful of times in the past year.
Took Emma for her annual physical today. She's healthy and the doctor is happy with her.
Noah's parent-teacher conference is Feb 11 at 4pm.
Went to Noah's conference on my own again. His reading has improved a lot thanks to the tutoring.
I'll take the kids this weekend.
Can't do this weekend after all, a work thing came up.
Emma's birthday is March 14. I'm putting together her party.
Emma's birthday party was today. You told her you'd come and you didn't. She cried herself to sleep.
Took both kids to the dentist. Noah needs a small filling - I scheduled it for April.
Noah's filling is done. I took him and paid for it.
Registered Emma and Noah for summer camp again. Another $600.
Emma's soccer tournament was this weekend. I took her both days and stayed for every game.
I had the kids last weekend.
Yes - that was your first overnight with them in months.
Emma's spring recital is June 2. The details are on the school website.
Honey, you do so much for Emma and Noah. You are an incredible mother.
I can't believe David missed Noah's birthday. You held everything together for that boy, like always.
Emma told me her dad didn't show for her party. You have been everything for those children, Sarah.
Remember I'm here whenever you need help with the kids. You shouldn't have to carry all of this alone.
